name: Spark I Acquisition Corp
business: Spark I Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company incorporated on July 12, 2021 as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or assets. To date, the company has generated no revenues and has no operating history. The company has not consummated any business combination and is actively negotiating a potential business combination with Kneron Holding Corporation, a provider of full stack edge AI solutions.

exposures.sentence: We announced in October 2024 that we had signed a non-binding letter-of-intent (LOI) for a business combination with Kneron Holding Corporation (Kneron), a leading provider of full stack edge artificial intelligence (AI) solutions based in San Diego, California, as well as a non-binding LOI for a business combination with a company in the hospitality software as a service/platform space.

We believe these impacts are driven by permanent changes in consumer behavior towards online, virtual and sharing economies (including changes being driven by the ongoing development and adaptation of generative AI and the metaverse).

We announced in October 2024 that we had signed a non-binding letter-of-intent (LOI) for a business combination with Kneron Holding Corporation (Kneron), a leading provider of full stack edge artificial intelligence (AI) solutions based in San Diego, California, as well as a non-binding LOI for a business combination with a company in the hospitality software as a service/platform space.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We may not be able to consummate an initial business combination by September 29, 2026, in which case we would cease all operations except for the purpose of winding up and we would redeem our public shares and liquidate.
